free_text: Total photoabsorption cross sections for high-Z
elements in the energy range 7-20 MeV.
Total photoabsorption cross sections for 13 isotopes
between Sm and Bi were measured in the energy range
7-20 MeV with uncertainties generally better than
to the sum of total photonuclear cross-section and
DATES are   corrected   from   two  to  four  digits
including that in reference and history,
REACTION and comment, BRA -> BRS, DATA in SUBENT 005
METHOD, COMMENT, ERR-ANALYS, REACTION free text,
